---
title: "Tag: Python"
---

```{=html}
<p>Models tagged with <span class="badge-tag">Python</span>:</p>

<div class="models-grid">

  <!-- ── Model card: sachau-2022-icesheet ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <a href="/models/sachau-2022-icesheet.html" class="mc-card-container"
     data-title="ismip-hom benchmark experiments using underworld"
     data-tags="ice-sheet benchmark stokes anisotropy mechanical python finite-element particle-in-cell"
     data-creators="till sachau haibin yang paul d. bons louis-noel moresi">
    <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModelAtlasofTheEarth/sachau-2022-icesheet/main/.website_material/graphics/gmd-15-8749-2022-f09.png"
         alt="ISMIP-HOM benchmark experiments using Underworld"
         onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/600x300/D64000/white?text=M%40TE+Model';" />
    <h3>ISMIP-HOM benchmark experiments using Underworld</h3>
    <p class="mc-card-abstract">Abstract. Numerical models have become an indispensable tool for
understanding and predicting the flow of ice sheets and glaciers. Here we
present the full-Stokes software package Underworld to the glaciological
community. The code is already well established in simulating complex
geodynamic syst...</p>
    <div class="mc-card-meta">
      <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/till-sachau.html">Till Sachau</a>
      <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/haibin-yang.html">Haibin Yang</a>
      <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/paul-d-bons.html">Paul D. Bons</a>
      <br/>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/ice-sheet.html">ice-sheet</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/benchmark.html">benchmark</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/stokes.html">Stokes</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/anisotropy.html">anisotropy</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/mechanical.html">mechanical</a>
      <br/>
      <a class="badge-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.25914/fhew-h678" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        <span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span>
        <span class="badge-doi-right">10.25914/fhew-h678</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </a>
  <!-- ── Model card: Yu-2025-granulites ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <a href="/models/Yu-2025-granulites.html" class="mc-card-container"
     data-title="rift foundering and the generation of non-orogenic granulites during the mesoproterozoic"
     data-tags="granulites melt emplacement python finite-element particle-in-cell"
     data-creators="ben steven knight">
    <img src="https://github.com/user-attachments/files/23468159/Model_evolution.pdf"
         alt="Rift foundering and the generation of non-orogenic granulites during the Mesoproterozoic"
         onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/600x300/D64000/white?text=M%40TE+Model';" />
    <h3>Rift foundering and the generation of non-orogenic granulites during the Mesoproterozoic</h3>
    <p class="mc-card-abstract">Mesoproterozoic orogens are unusual in that they commonly preserve a record of high geothermal gradients, low crustal thickness, and limited topography. One such terrane is the Fraser Zone in the Albany–Fraser Orogen (AFO), Western Australia, where granulite-facies rocks record a counterclockwise...</p>
    <div class="mc-card-meta">
      <a class="badge-creator" href="/creators/ben-steven-knight.html">Ben Steven Knight</a>
      <br/>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/granulites.html">granulites</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/melt.html">melt</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/emplacement.html">emplacement</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/python.html">python</a>
      <a class="badge-tag" href="/tags/finite-element.html">finite element</a>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```
